nodes.author: Ali Yassin, Youssef Nasser, Mariette Awad, Ahmed Al-Dubai, Ran Liu, Chau Yuen, Ronald Raulefs, Elias Aboutanios

nodes.label: Hybrid Data Fusion for Indoor Localization
nodes.source_file: raw/Sci-Hub. Recent Advances in Indoor Localization: A Survey on Theoretical Approaches and Applications.pdf
nodes.rationale: Combining heterogeneous radio access technologies (e.g., cellular + WLAN) using data fusion addresses hearability limitations and improves coverage and accuracy beyond single-technology approaches.
